title: tanacetum niveum
intro: Tanacetum niveum, also known as the White Tansy, is a perennial herb belonging to the Asteraceae family, characterized by its white or pale yellow flowers and fern-like foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to repel insects and act as a natural antiseptic. The health benefits of Tanacetum niveum include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
